scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:api" "npx electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.json
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && npx electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.json
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run build && npx electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.json
